title: euphrasia nemorosa subsp. stricta
intro: Euphrasia nemorosa subsp. stricta, also known as Woodland Eyebright, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the gentian family (Gentianaceae). It has been used in traditional herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects, which can help to soothe and protect the eyes and skin. The health benefits of Euphrasia nemorosa subsp. stricta include its ability to reduce eye inflammation, alleviate conjunctivitis, and even help with respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Euphrasia nemorosa subsp. stricta can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or eye wash, and has been used in folk medicine for generations to promote overall health and well-being.
